SEARCH
Package com.example.moogerscouncil

Class Counselor

java.lang.Object
com.example.moogerscouncil.Counselor
public class Counselor extends Object
Represents a counselor profile in the BetterCAPS system. Maps directly to a document in the Firestore 'counselors' collection.

Follows the Firestore model convention: no-argument constructor, private fields, public getters and setters.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Counselor()
    Required empty constructor for Firestore deserialization.

    Description

    getBio()
    Returns the counselor's biography shown on their profile screen.

    Returns the counselor's gender as displayed on their profile.

    Returns the counselor's spoken language preference.

    Returns the counselor's display name.

    Returns whether this counselor is currently on leave.

    Returns the custom message displayed when the counselor is on leave.

    Returns the Firestore document ID of the colleague counselor this counselor refers students to during leave (US-19).

    Returns the list of specialization tags for this counselor.
    String

    Returns the Firebase Auth UID linked to this counselor's user account.

  • Constructor Details

    • Counselor

      public Counselor()
      Required empty constructor for Firestore deserialization.

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Returns the Firestore document ID for this counselor. Set after deserialization via setId(String).
      Returns:
      The document ID string, or null before it is set.

    • setId

      public void setId(String id)
      Sets the Firestore document ID. Called after deserialization to attach the document's own ID to the object.
      Parameters:
      id - The Firestore document ID.

    • getUid

      public String getUid()
      Returns the Firebase Auth UID linked to this counselor's user account.
      Returns:
      The UID string.

    • setUid

      public void setUid(String uid)
      Sets the Firebase Auth UID for this counselor.
      Parameters:
      uid - The Firebase Auth UID.

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the counselor's display name.
      Returns:
      The name string.

    • setName

      public void setName(String name)
      Sets the counselor's display name.
      Parameters:
      name - The display name.

    • getBio

      public String getBio()
      Returns the counselor's biography shown on their profile screen.
      Returns:
      The bio string, or null if not set.

    • setBio

      public void setBio(String bio)
      Sets the counselor's biography.
      Parameters:
      bio - The biography text.

    • getSpecializations

      public List<String> getSpecializations()
      Returns the list of specialization tags for this counselor. Values are matched against SpecializationTags constants.
      Returns:
      List of specialization tag strings, or null if not set.

    • setSpecializations

      public void setSpecializations(List<String> specializations)
      Sets the counselor's specialization tags.
      Parameters:
      specializations - List of tag strings from SpecializationTags.

    • getLanguage

      public String getLanguage()
      Returns the counselor's spoken language preference.
      Returns:
      Language string (e.g. "English", "Urdu"), or null if not set.

    • setLanguage

      public void setLanguage(String language)
      Sets the counselor's spoken language preference.
      Parameters:
      language - Language string.

    • getGender

      public String getGender()
      Returns the counselor's gender as displayed on their profile.
      Returns:
      Gender string, or null if not set.

    • setGender

      public void setGender(String gender)
      Sets the counselor's gender.
      Parameters:
      gender - Gender string.

    • getOnLeave

      public Boolean getOnLeave()
      Returns whether this counselor is currently on leave. When true, their profile shows an "On Leave" badge and booking is disabled.
      Returns:
      Boolean true if on leave, false or null if available.

    • setOnLeave

      public void setOnLeave(Boolean onLeave)
      Sets the counselor's on-leave status.
      Parameters:
      onLeave - True if the counselor is currently on leave.

    • getOnLeaveMessage

      public String getOnLeaveMessage()
      Returns the custom message displayed when the counselor is on leave. Typically explains the absence and/or refers to a colleague.
      Returns:
      The leave message string, or null if not set.

    • setOnLeaveMessage

      public void setOnLeaveMessage(String onLeaveMessage)
      Sets the counselor's on-leave message.
      Parameters:
      onLeaveMessage - The custom leave message.

    • getReferralCounselorId

      public String getReferralCounselorId()
      Returns the Firestore document ID of the colleague counselor this counselor refers students to during leave (US-19).
      Returns:
      The referral counselor's document ID, or null if not set.

    • setReferralCounselorId

      public void setReferralCounselorId(String referralCounselorId)
      Sets the referral counselor ID for on-leave redirect (US-19).
      Parameters:
      referralCounselorId - Document ID of the referring colleague.
